mapper.sql: I.ID, I.COMP_CD, I.IF_NO, I.IF_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS IF_TYP_NM, I.IF_NM, I.DIRECTION, I.SYS_CD, I.REF_TYP, I.REF_ID, I.REF_NO, I.PAYLOAD, I.IF_STATUS, S.CD_NM_KO AS IF_STATUS_NM, TO_CHAR(I.SENT_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SENT_DT, I.RESULT_MSG, I.RETRY_CNT, I.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(I.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT
mapper.select: SELECT FROM IF_INTERFACE I LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='IF_TYP' AND T.CD=I.IF_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='IF_STATUS' AND S.CD=I.IF_STATUS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE 1=1 AND I.IF_TYP=#{ifTyp} AND I.IF_STATUS=#{ifStatus} AND (I.IF_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR I.REF_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR I.IF_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') ORDER BY I.ID DESC

SELECT FROM IF_INTERFACE I LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='IF_TYP' AND T.CD=I.IF_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='IF_STATUS' AND S.CD=I.IF_STATUS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE I.ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IF_INTERFACE (COMP_CD, IF_NO, IF_TYP, IF_NM, DIRECTION, SYS_CD, REF_TYP, REF_ID, REF_NO, PAYLOAD, IF_STATUS, REG_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{ifNo}, #{ifTyp}, #{ifNm}, NVL(#{direction},'SEND'), #{sysCd}, #{refTyp}, #{refId}, #{refNo}, #{payload}, 'READY', #{regId})
